title: PackTAS
description: This Datapack creates an esay to use Menu to make TAS Recordings. (Please note that this is still in alpha)
body: # PackTAS Datapack New Updates Soon! ## Features Since this datapack is in early alpha so there's not much but: - In the Inventory there's an Clock which when dropped opens an menu. - Change the Game Speed with ease - Freeze (and unfreeze) the Game! - Making you invincible - No Mods, Resource Packs or other downloads needed. - Works in the newest and Versions! (if i don't forget) ## The Menu Esay access to the menu through the inventory!
